resources.string:
APIs configured here are used for both auto-reporting and manual reporting.

- Privacy
The API endpoints will see your:

  - IP address
  - TLS and TCP fingerprints (which may reveal your Android version)
  - The reported number (including your country code)

Nothing else will be reported.

- Manual reporting
If any API is enabled here, tap a number in the call history to show a report button.

The number will be reported to all APIs.

- Auto reporting
Report delay
  - SMS is always auto-reported immediately.
  - When a call is blocked, there will be a one-hour time buffer before it\'s reported. If the number is allowed later, either due to repeats, dialed back, or being added to contacts within this time buffer, it\'s considered a non-spam and the reporting will be canceled.

Report type
1. It will not report:

- Allowed records
- Testing
And records blocked by:
- Database
- Meeting Mode
- Instant Query (to prevent the API endpoint\'s number from being leaked to other competitors)

2. It will report records that blocked by:

- Non-Contact
- STIR Attestation
- Regex

3. One exception:

When a call is blocked by Database and the number was originally added by API query, it will be reported back to that API to increase the rating score.

For example, if the number was added by an API query from check.com, it will only report to check.com, not to others.com.
